hero.eyebrow: Digital loyalty cards for small businesses
hero.subtitle: LoyalFlow replaces paper loyalty cards with a digital card, QR scanning, and automatic rewards — so every repeat visit is tracked, rewarded, and turned into a habit.
hero.subtitleExtra: No printing, no lost cards, no manual bookkeeping — you see everything your customers earn and redeem live in one dashboard, while marketing, birthday perks, and referrals run automatically in the background.
hero.trust: Free to start · No paperwork · Set up in 5 minutes

stats.srLabel: Key numbers about the LoyalFlow platform

why.title: All the upside of a loyalty card, none of the downsides
why.subtitle: Customers already expect a digital experience. LoyalFlow gives them one, and takes the admin work off your plate.
items: No paper cards that get lost, torn, or left at home
The card always lives on the customer's phone, ready to scan in seconds
Eco-friendly — no printing, no paper waste
Customers track points, stamps, and progress toward the next reward live
Reminders and birthday perks are sent out completely automatically
One app for all your loyalty programs, on every device

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From sign-up to a customer's first reward — in four steps.

steps.title: Create a free account
steps.description: Register your business and set up a loyalty program — points, stamps, discounts, or VIP tiers, whatever fits you.

steps.title: The customer gets a digital card
steps.description: A card with a QR code arrives instantly, no app download required — it opens right in the phone's browser.

steps.title: Scan the QR on every visit
steps.description: Points and stamps are added automatically, and the customer sees their progress live, right after scanning.

steps.title: The customer returns for a reward
steps.description: You track everything — visits, rewards, and your most loyal customers — in one clear dashboard, with zero paperwork.

dashboard.subtitle: Track customers, visits, and rewards in real time — no spreadsheets, no manual tallying.

faq.title: Everything you want to know about LoyalFlow

items.question: Do I need technical skills to set up LoyalFlow?
items.answer: No. Registration takes a couple of minutes, and you set up your loyalty program through simple forms — no coding or agencies required.

items.question: Does the customer need to download an app?
items.answer: No, the card opens directly in the phone's browser. Customers get it by scanning a QR code or clicking a link.

items.question: Can I choose whether customers earn points or stamps?
items.answer: Yes. For each loyalty program you choose the earning type — points per visit, points per amount spent, or a combination of both.

items.question: What happens when a card expires?
items.answer: If you set an expiry period, points are voided automatically and the card stops working — the customer gets a clear notice about it.

items.question: Can rewards be a discount instead of just a free item?
items.answer: Yes, every reward can be set up as a percentage discount or as a fully free item, whichever suits your business best.

items.question: How quickly can I start using LoyalFlow?
items.answer: Registering and setting up your first loyalty program takes about five minutes. You can start sharing the card with customers right after.

items.question: Is it free to get started?
items.answer: Yes, you can start for free with no card details required. As your business grows, you can upgrade your plan.

items.question: Can I run more than one loyalty program at the same time?
items.answer: Yes, a single business can run several loyalty programs at once — for example one for coffee and a separate one for treatments.

items.question: How do customers find my business?
items.answer: Businesses appear in a public directory that customers can search by category and city.

items.question: Is my customers' data safe?
items.answer: Yes, all data is stored securely with strict access rules, in line with modern data protection standards.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Yes, there's no contractual lock-in — you can close your account whenever you like.

items.question: Does LoyalFlow work on every device?
items.answer: Yes, the app works identically on mobile, tablet, and desktop, in every modern browser.
